release_notes: 修正開啟內網監聽後從 ComfyUI Manager 安裝插件失敗的問題
changes: 修正開啟內網監聽 (LAN) 後,從 ComfyUI Manager 安裝插件會失敗的問題

en: Fixed: installing custom nodes via ComfyUI Manager now works when LAN listen mode is enabled (Manager security level is auto-adjusted for non-loopback listens)
zh-TW: 修正開啟內網監聽 (LAN) 後,從 ComfyUI Manager 安裝插件會失敗的問題
